description: former skyscraper complex in Manhattan, New York (1968-2001)
description_wiki: The original World Trade Center (WTC) was a complex of seven buildings in the Financial District of Lower Manhattan in New York City.

description: law enforcement agency in New York and New Jersey
description_wiki: The Port Authority of New York and New Jersey Police Department, or Port Authority Police Department (PAPD), is a law enforcement agency in New York and New Jersey, the duties of which are to protect and to enforce state and city laws at all the facilities, owned or operated by the Port Authority of New York and New Jersey (PANYNJ), the bi-state agency running  airports, seaports, and many bridges and tunnels within the Port of New York and New Jersey.

description: township in Middlesex County, New Jersey, United States
description_wiki: Edison is a township in Middlesex County, New Jersey, United States.

description: township in Ocean County, New Jersey
description_wiki: Toms River is a township located on the Jersey Shore in Ocean County, in the U.S. state of New Jersey.
The Raritan River is a river of the U.S. state of New Jersey.
Howard Allan Stern (born January 12, 1954) is an American broadcaster, comedian, and media personality.

aliases: The Statue of Liberty Enlightening the World
description: American icon in New York, United States
description_wiki: The Statue of Liberty (Liberty Enlightening the World; French: La Liberté éclairant le monde) is a colossal neoclassical sculpture of a robed and crowned woman on Liberty Island in New York Harbor, within New York City.

description: island in New York Harbor in the United States of America
description_wiki: Ellis Island is an island in New York Harbor, within the U.S. states of New Jersey and New York.

description: state police in the United States
description_wiki: The New Jersey State Police (NJSP) is the official state police force of the U.S. state of New Jersey.

description: road tunnel between Manhattan, New York and Jersey City, New Jersey in the United States
description_wiki: The Holland Tunnel is a vehicular tunnel under the Hudson River that connects Hudson Square and Lower Manhattan in New York City in the east to Jersey City, New Jersey, in the west.

surface_forms: the park here, Liberty State Park
description: park located on Upper New York Bay in Jersey City, New Jersey
description_wiki: Liberty State Park (LSP) is a 1,212 acres (490 ha) state park in the U.S. state of New Jersey, located on Upper New York Bay in Jersey City opposite Liberty Island and Ellis Island.

description: police department in Jersey City, New Jersey
public park in Manhattan, New York City, New York, United States

bay on the southern side of Long Island, New York, USA
description_wiki: Jamaica Bay (also known as Grassy Bay) is an estuary on the southern portion of the western tip of Long Island, in the U.S. state of New York.

description: capital city of the United States of America
description_wiki: Washington, D.C., officially the District of Columbia and commonly known as simply Washington or D.C., is the capital city and federal district of the United States.
